name: Suite Royale Al-Andalus
shortDescription: A majestic suite featuring original 18th-century zellige and a private plunge pool.
longDescription: Experience unparalleled luxury in the Suite Royale Al-Andalus. This expansive suite offers stunning courtyard views, a grand king-size bed draped in fine linens, and an en-suite bathroom adorned with traditional tadelakt and zellige tiles. Relax in your private lounge area or step out to the private terrace.

name: Jasmine Courtyard Room
shortDescription: An elegant room opening directly onto our tranquil central courtyard, scented with jasmine.
longDescription: The Jasmine Courtyard Room is a serene retreat on the ground floor. Wake up to the gentle sounds of the central fountain and the scent of jasmine. It features authentic Moroccan furnishings, hand-carved cedar wood details, and a luxurious tadelakt bathroom.

name: Oasis Garden Suite
shortDescription: A spacious suite overlooking the lush gardens and main swimming pool.
longDescription: Immerse yourself in nature in the Oasis Garden Suite. With large windows offering sweeping views of the riad's botanical gardens and pool, this suite is flooded with natural light. It includes a king bed, a comfortable sitting area with a sofa bed, and a private balcony.

name: Medina View Penthouse
shortDescription: Our most exclusive offering with panoramic rooftop views of the ancient Medina.
longDescription: The Medina View Penthouse is the crown jewel of Dar Safaa. Situated on the top floor, it features a private rooftop terrace providing unobstructed views of the city skyline and Atlas Mountains. It includes two bedrooms, a spacious living room, and dedicated butler service.

name: Saffron Deluxe Room
shortDescription: Decorated in warm saffron tones, offering a cozy and authentic atmosphere.
longDescription: The Saffron Deluxe Room offers a warm, inviting ambiance with its rich color palette and intricate brass lanterns. Located on the first floor, it provides a quiet sanctuary with a plush queen-size bed and a beautifully detailed en-suite bathroom.

name: Palm Poolside Room
shortDescription: Step directly from your room to our stunning azure pool.
longDescription: Perfect for sun lovers, the Palm Poolside Room offers direct access to the riad's main swimming pool. The room features cool tadelakt walls, a comfortable king-size bed, and a private shaded patio area.

name: Atlas Family Suite
shortDescription: A generous, interconnected suite perfect for families or groups.
longDescription: Designed with families in mind, the Atlas Family Suite consists of two interconnected rooms and a shared central living area. It offers ample space, luxurious amenities, and views over both the courtyard and the surrounding medina.

name: Citrus Grove Room
shortDescription: Tucked away in a quiet corner of our gardens, surrounded by orange and lemon trees.
longDescription: The Citrus Grove Room is a secluded haven situated amongst our fragrant orange and lemon trees. It offers exceptional privacy, a comfortable queen bed, and a charming rustic design that reflects the agricultural heritage of the region.
